powers.label: Sprint Health Check
powers.prompt: Analyze current sprint health: burndown trajectory, at-risk items (not started, blocked, stale), completion forecast, and recommended actions.

powers.label: Generate Standup
powers.prompt: Generate today's standup summary from Jira activity: what moved yesterday, what's in progress today, blockers, and items needing attention.

powers.label: Sprint Goal Progress
powers.prompt: Evaluate progress toward the sprint goal: which goal-related stories are done, in progress, or at risk. Provide a confidence score.

powers.label: At-Risk Items
powers.prompt: Identify items at risk of not completing this sprint: stories not started, blocked items, items with no recent activity, and overcommitted developers.

powers.label: Grooming Candidates
powers.prompt: Identify backlog items needing grooming: unestimated stories, stories without acceptance criteria, stale items (>30 days), and items missing priority.

powers.label: Priority Conflicts
powers.prompt: Analyze the backlog for priority conflicts: multiple P1s competing, misaligned priorities between epics, and items that should be reprioritized based on dependencies.

powers.label: Epic Health
powers.prompt: For each active epic: show progress percentage, remaining stories, estimated completion date, and whether it's on track for the target release.

powers.label: Capacity vs Committed
powers.prompt: Compare team capacity (available story points based on velocity) against committed work for the current and next sprint. Flag overcommitment.

powers.label: Next Sprint Candidates
powers.prompt: Recommend items for next sprint based on: priority, dependencies resolved, grooming status, and alignment with roadmap goals.

powers.label: Release Readiness
powers.prompt: Assess release readiness: feature completion, test coverage, open defects, documentation status, and deployment prerequisites.

powers.label: Sprint Review Deck
powers.prompt: Generate sprint review content: completed features with demos, metrics (velocity, quality), retrospective themes, and next sprint preview.

powers.label: Release Notes
powers.prompt: Generate release notes from completed stories: group by feature, include business value, known issues, and migration notes if applicable.

powers.label: Stakeholder Update
powers.prompt: Draft a stakeholder update email: delivery progress, key decisions made, upcoming milestones, risks, and items needing input.

powers.label: Retro Prep
powers.prompt: Prepare retrospective data: sprint metrics vs previous, recurring patterns from Jira (blocked items, carry-over), and suggested discussion topics.
